# kSecPropertyTypeSection

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a string describing the name of a field in the certificate (`CFSTR("Subject Name")`, for example).

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecPropertyTypeSection: CFString
```
title: kSecPropertyTypeSection
